---
title: "Under the Storm, or, Steadfast’s Charge."
---

## Under the Storm, or, Steadfast’s Charge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1887
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
